title: delphinium strictum var. distichiflorum
intro: Delphinium strictum var. distichiflorum, also known as the upright larkspur, is a perennial plant species in the buttercup family that is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Delphinium strictum var. distichiflorum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
